name: notesmd_search
description: Search note content for a term and return matching notes.

query.description: Search term to find in note content

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_read
description: Print the full contents of a note.

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. '01-admin/AI Assistant.md')

mentions.description: Include linked mentions at the end of output

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_create
description: Create a new note or update an existing note with content.

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. '00-inbox/New Note.md')

content.description: Note content in markdown format including YAML frontmatter

replace.description: true to overwrite existing content; false to append to existing content

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_list
description: List files and folders in a vault directory.

path.description: Directory path relative to vault root (lists vault root if omitted)

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_delete
description: Delete a note from the vault.

path.description: Note path relative to vault root (e.g. '00-inbox/Old Note.md')

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_frontmatter_read
description: Print the YAML frontmatter of a note.

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)

name: notesmd_frontmatter_edit
description: Set or update a YAML frontmatter key in a note.

value.description: Value to set for the key (e.g. 'done', 'draft')

vault.description: Vault name (uses default vault if omitted)
